parts.purpose: Groups the bounded visual, visible context, and one native FileTrigger.
Renders the selected or consumer-transformed image from a lifecycle-safe owned object URL.
Exposes file name, locale-aware size, and MIME context without decoding untrusted content.
Provides consumer crop/edit and native selection removal hooks.

parts.element: optional Mergora UploadProgress and retry button
parts.purpose: Presents consumer-owned server lifecycle without starting transfer.
Keeps invalid type and size recovery visible and announced.
